## Testing
- [ ] **Bot unit tests**: `pytest tests/` pass locally
- [ ] **WebUI unit tests**: `python run_tests.py --unit` pass locally

## UI/UX Verification (for WebUI changes)
- [ ] Visual verification of styling and layout
- [ ] Interactive elements work as expected (buttons, dropdowns, forms)
- [ ] Real-time updates via Socket.IO verified (if applicable)

## Security Considerations
- [ ] No sensitive data exposed or committed in `.env` or other files
- [ ] Discord role hierarchy and permissions reviewed
- [ ] Secrets properly managed (using environment variables)
- [ ] Input validation and sanitization implemented
